name: Node.js Express Mocha & Chai Starter
description: A Node.js starter template with Express.js, Babel support, and a complete testing setup using Mocha and Chai for asynchronous testing and coverage reporting.
features: Babel transpilation for modern JavaScript (ES6+) support
ESLint configured for code quality and consistency
Basic utilities and scalable project structure
Mocha and Chai configured for testing
Support for asynchronous testing and coverage reporting
